blocks.content: Alpheus gave a bittersweet smile.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: The vastness of the universe might be no more than a speck of dust to an external being. So what significance do we hold in this universe? That terrifying truth is what Void aims to convey. Shirone has taken his first step towards that truth.
The two remained silent for a while, knowing they were thinking of the same scene.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: How close has that child come to the truth?
Nineteen years ago, the first student in the school's history passed the seventh stage of survival.
An Unlocker who had grasped the truth of scale and transcended the essence of humanity.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: Adrias Miro. When I founded the school, I hoped for at least one genius to surpass me. But when I saw Miro, what I felt was fear. Perhaps that child should never have been born.
Alpheus, once a renowned genius in the kingdom, found Miro different.
A student whose brilliance and peculiarity couldn't be fully described by the word 'genius.'

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: Not long after the survival test, there was the Judgment of the Twenty. I can't say it didn't have an impact. Everyone wants to be a genius, but for Miro, it was a curse.
Olivia's eyes calmed.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Does she... resent me?

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: It was a difficult issue. Miro's sacrifice saved us all. And now, 19 years later, Shirone stands here.
That's why it was unsettling.
History doesn't repeat itself just because of some similarities, but the Judgment of the Twenty was a primordial sin of humanity that should never be repeated.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: Don't jump to conclusions. Just because she broke through Void doesn't mean the 'Holy War' will move. At that time, Miro was already a fully developed scale magician. Even if we had sent her into society, she would have been among the best in the world.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: True. But ultimately, levels are drawn to realms.
The limits were not yet visible. Therefore, there was no guarantee that the feared events wouldn't occur.
Shirone's smiling face, receiving praise from his friends, resembled the clear face of Miro from 19 years ago.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: 'Miro held the lives of all humanity in her hands. Shirone, what will you hold in that vast vessel?'
The survival evaluation ended on the last holiday of the fourth week.
Week 5: Mental Activity Evaluation.
The mental activity evaluation, which assessed changes in the Spirit Zone, saw a significant increase in difficulty from the fifth week with the introduction of the advanced technique 'Joint.'
As an element opposed to endurance, Shirone was focusing more than usual, performing warm-up exercises.
Shirone was quick and rational in his thinking.
But thinking of this as an evaluation of human-level traits would be a big mistake.
The mental fluidity of magicians specialized in mental activity was unparalleled.
For them, belief meant having no belief.
Their minds had no qualms about assimilating with others, even monsters.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: Arian Shirone. You're next.
At the teacher's call, Shirone entered the Image Zone.
The evaluation standard for the Spirit Zone was a diameter of 20 meters.
As the floor became transparent, a sphere of mental energy appeared around Shirone.
A signal sounded.
The first problem was presented.
It was a figure-eight filter with two circles attached vertically.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What? This is really hard.
Watching others, he thought there would be enough time, but experiencing it himself, he realized he was mistaken.
Shirone put all his effort into jointing his Spirit Zone. Meanwhile, the filter approached indifferently.
10 meters. 5 meters.
His heart pounded harder as the distance closed.
With just 1 meter left, the center of his Spirit Zone tightened, and the filter passed through Shirone.
A green light of success lit up ahead.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Phew, that was close.'
The subsequent problems were variations of the figure-eight filter at different angles.
Unlike the first time, Shirone operated his Spirit Zone smoothly, passing the filters.
Though his mental fluidity was lower, he had another weapon: exceptional insight. Once he grasped the core, his application skills were unmatched.
Having passed all ten problems, Shirone earned 5 points, but his face wasn't bright as he left the Image Zone.
By the fifth week, no student had scored 4 points.
The high level of the students contributed, but mental activity was a learnable skill through training.
Class Two students had already experienced the 30-week evaluation, so they were well-prepared for the fifth week's difficulty.
But that fact wasn't comforting. Class Three also had some exceptional talents.

blocks.speaker: Teacher
blocks.content: Next, Arin. Please come to the Image Zone.
The chatting students fell silent.
It was rare even in society to see a mental magician with the weapon of 'super sense' perform.
The lights in the Image Zone dimmed, and Arin's Spirit Zone became visible, glowing blue.
Among the five patterns prepared for the fifth week, the figure-eight filter Shirone had faced appeared again.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What is she doing?
As the filter approached her nose, Arin's Spirit Zone rippled like water and tightened instantly.
There were gasps from Class One. Even Shirone, familiar with Arin's skills, was astonished.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Unbelievable. How can a human mind change like that?'
For Arin, the world was filled only with sensations.
The murky desires emitted by all kinds of people.
If her thoughts weren't as fluid as water, she would have gone mad, buried under the anger, lust, and hostility directed at her.
That's why Arcane had also rated Arin as the greatest talent in the mental field.
After her near-miraculous performance, the gauge showed a filter volume ratio of 99.9%.
It meant she had shaped the Image Zone's proposed form with no margin of error.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'This senior class isn't easy.'
With all the students' evaluations completed, almost everyone scored 5 points, except Aider, who missed two problems.
The first 4-point scorer in mental activity this year. Shirone felt that dishonor wasn't far from him.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'He seems to have a similar disposition to me.'
Despite his young age, Aider had shown remarkable endurance, reaching Stage 5, Insect King, in the survival evaluation. He had a similar disposition to Shirone.
The difference was that Aider lacked Shirone's insight.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'But he's still young. With 1-2 more years of training, he might actually graduate.'
Aider came down from the Image Zone, looking dejected.

blocks.speaker: Aider
blocks.content: Man, that was really hard.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You were close. If you had jointed a bit faster, you would have made it.

blocks.speaker: Aider
blocks.content: If it were that easy, I would have done it. I'm not a genius like you.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What are you talking about? You're the youngest student in the senior class. That's proof you're on par with us. Plus, mental activity improves with training.

blocks.speaker: Aider
blocks.content: Honestly, I thought so until last year. But seeing Class Three this time, that thought vanished. Arin and everyone else are incredible.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Plus, my major is in the air element. It's the most common. People say it's for those without talent.
Affinity with an element is closely related to omnipotence. But nothing is absolute.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's not true. There are many strong air element users. Sabina is strong, and...
To boost Aider's morale, Gaold, the head of the Magic Association, would be a perfect example, but he didn't want to risk revealing confidential information.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Hey, Aider! What are you doing there? Get over here!
Already annoyed by losing 20 points, seeing Aider chatting with Shirone made him furious.

blocks.speaker: Aider
blocks.content: Oh, I have to go. You know, survival strategy for the youngest.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Haha! Sure, go ahead.
Aider turned and hurried away. Being still inexperienced, he aimed to benefit from good relationships.
In a way, it seemed sly, but his honesty made it hard to dislike him.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Do your best, Aider.'
After the evaluation, the students headed to the dining hall.
The senior class had flexible meal times, so the food was prepared buffet-style.
Shirone's friends sat across and beside him, continuing the conversation Nade had started.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Then I got a cramp in my calf. It hurt so much that I curled up, but I squeezed so hard that I farted.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Hehe, that must have been awkward. What happened then?

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: My leg hurt like hell, but I couldn't stop laughing. So I laughed and cried! Hahaha!
Shirone clutched his stomach and stomped his foot.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I can imagine. In that situation, you'd cry.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Hey, why are you talking about that while we're eating?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Despite her protest, Amy had a smile on her face. She had found more peace of mind this year with Shirone's group joining the senior class.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Hi, mind if I join you?
Maya from Class Two approached with a tray.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Oh, of course.
Nade pulled out a chair for her, and Maya bowed slightly before sitting down.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: Thanks. It looked so fun, I wanted to join in.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: You might not want to. Nade's humor isn't exactly dinner-friendly.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: Haha! It's okay. I have a strong stomach. What were you talking about?
Shirone watched Maya blend naturally with his friends, thanks to his unique ability to connect with people.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: Hey, why are you staring at another girl when your girlfriend is right here?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huh? No, I was just...

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Hmph, girlfriend, my foot.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: Maya playfully glanced at Amy and took a big bite of her meat, washing it down with a gulp of water.
Shirone's group simultaneously paused their knife work to look at her.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: It seemed like she was forcing it down rather than enjoying it.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: Oh, sorry. That must have looked bad.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No, not at all. It's just a bit unusual. You can't taste the meat if you drink water with it.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: Maya nodded bitterly.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: You're right. But I have no choice. I have to eat to maintain this body. I naturally don't gain weight easily.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Is there a specific reason you need to gain weight?

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: Of course. My major is sound magic, specifically in the buff category. Increasing my volume expands the effect range and improves efficiency.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Does gaining weight necessarily increase your volume?

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: It might not, but in my case, it seems to help. Honestly, it's because I lack talent. So I'm desperately trying to build up my body.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You'd look really pretty if you lost weight.
This time, everyone focused on Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I mean, you're already pretty, but you'd be even prettier if you lost weight... That's what I meant.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: Thank you. Shirone, you're really kind. Amy is lucky.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Hmph, lucky indeed. You'll find out soon enough how frustrating he can be.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: Really? I like him...
Caught between Maya's and Amy's contrasting attitudes, the three boys could only bury their faces in their trays.
